message:
fix: preserve __none__ sentinel in cluster/distribution reconciliation (#9784)

The deselectAll handlers set state to ['__none__'] as a sentinel to
represent 'no items selected'. However the reconciliation effects that
prune stale cluster/distribution names were stripping the sentinel
(it is not a real cluster name), resetting state back to [] which
means 'all selected'. This made the None button appear to do nothing.

Skip reconciliation when the sentinel is present so the deselect-all
state is preserved correctly.

Fixes #9782

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
